name: HRC_DL_UI_BUS_OBJECTS_V
query: SELECT OBJ.BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID, OBJ.BUS_OBJ_FILE_DISCRIMINATOR, OBJ.BUS_OBJ_TOP_DISCRIMINATOR, OBJ.BUS_OBJ_SERVICE_VERSION, OBJ.PARENT_BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID, OBJ.UI_BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID, OBJ.PROCESSING_ORDER, OBJ.WS_CONNECTION_QNAME, VL.UI_BUSINESS_OBJECT_GUID, VL.UI_NAME, VL.UI_DESCRIPTION, VL.CREATED_BY, VL.CREATION_DATE, VL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, VL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, VL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, VL.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, VL.ENTERPRISE_ID, OBJ.PRODUCT_AREA, OBJ.EA_PROFILE_OPTION_NAME, OBJ.EA_PROFILE_OPTION_TYPE, OBJ.EA_PROFILE_OPTION_HASH_STRING FROM HRC_DL_BUSINESS_OBJECTS OBJ, HRC_DL_UI_BUS_OBJECTS_VL VL WHERE OBJ.UI_BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID = VL.UI_BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID(+)
